---
name: Design handoff
about: Feature request with mocks and other handoff materials
title: ""
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Description

What is the objective of this feature

## Target

Is this feature meant to be added to the Minerva design system and made available to developers across campus?
If so, is this feature meant to be made baseline available for users of the WordPress theme or added to the Advanced Blocks plugin for use within our department?
If not, is this feature meant to be added to a specific site via child theme or plugin? If so, what site(s) are meant to receive this feature?

## Mocks

Insert any visual or interactive mocks for this feature. Mocks can be annotated screenshots from Figma, an exported Figma file, a Claude artifact or Claude Design project

### Options / Props

A list of controls you want this feature to have, as well as any expected inputs

### Behavior

A description of how the component should behave. Bonus points if you can link to the correct [ARIA pattern](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/) or semantic HTML structure.

### Supplementary mocks

Add links to inspiration sites or code mocks such as those generated by Claude Code

## Additional information

Any additional information you want the developers to be aware of
